common.guest_limit_desc: Guest mode is limited to 3 entries. To save your logs permanently and unlock AI analysis, please log in.

app.title: LifePulse AI
app.subtitle: One sentence for logs, money, and plans

auth.subtitle: Write down today, and life becomes easier to review
auth.guest_warning_1: Data stored locally in browser, cleared users lose data.
auth.terms_hint: By logging in, you agree to our

nav.drawer_desc: Keep page switching and common tools in one place so the top area stays calm.
nav.drawer_group_navigation_desc: Switch between chat, history, plans, finance, and analytics.
nav.drawer_group_tools_desc: Open logging tools, goal management, and the composer directly.
nav.drawer_open_goals_desc: Review goals, streak status, and reward points

plans.title: My Plans
plans.subtitle: Manage reminders and schedule items inside the app first, then connect native sync step by step.
plans.bridge_title: The fastest way to add something new is still a sentence
plans.bridge_desc: Go back to the chat home and say something like “Meet the client tomorrow at 9 AM”, and the assistant will keep turning it into a plan for you.
plans.guest_hint: The plan module is designed for signed-in users. Guests can still try the natural-language composer from the log entry flow.
plans.today_desc: Put tasks and upcoming events into one place for today.
plans.calendar_desc: The first version ships with month view and a day drawer.
plans.empty_today_desc: You can start with a sentence like: Meet product team tomorrow at 3 PM.
plans.empty_day_desc: A future iteration will support long-press quick create from here.
plans.created_from_text: A plan was created from your sentence.
plans.login_required: Please sign in to use the plan feature.
plans.operation_failed: Plan action failed. Please try again.

invite.title: Invite Friends
invite.desc: Share your link and start logging daily life together

goals.title: Daily streaks
goals.start_desc: Start with something light and keep it going.
goals.start_prompt: Log something today and move one step closer.
goals.compose_title: Define this streak before you begin
goals.type_7_day_desc: Great for getting back into logging
goals.type_21_day_desc: Great for turning logging into a routine
goals.reward_placeholder: For example: Buy myself a good coffee
goals.reward_hint: Start with a small reward now. You can evolve this into a product reward later.
goals.delete_confirm: Delete "{{title}}"? It will be removed from your plan records.
goals.official_desc: Official plans ship with official completion badges and richer rewards for focused challenge rounds.
goals.official_primary_hint: Official plans become the primary reward plan when joined and award an official badge on completion.
goals.official_empty: There are no published official plans yet.
goals.today_done: Today is already done. Keep going.
goals.today_pending: Nothing logged today yet. Start with one small thing.
goals.parallel_desc: One log today will advance every active plan that has not checked in yet.
goals.analytics_empty: You have not started a streak goal yet.
goals.analytics_today_done: You logged today, so your streak is still moving.
goals.analytics_today_pending: Log something today to keep the streak alive.
goals.completed_hint: You finished all {{days}} days. Starting another round is a good idea.
goals.failed_hint: This streak was interrupted. You can always start a new one.
goals.failed_restart_hint: This run is interrupted. A matching log can auto-restart it within the remaining quota and continue from the days already completed.
goals.paused_hint: This plan is paused, so it will not fail while paused. Resume it whenever you are ready.
goals.resume_hint: You can resume the paused plan or start a new streak right away.
goals.resume_detail: Resuming keeps the remaining progress, but the streak count restarts from 0.
goals.pause_detail: Paused plans will not fail. When resumed, remaining progress stays, but the streak count restarts from 0.
goals.restart_rule_hint: Auto-restart keeps the completed days and only restarts the streak count. You get 1 restart for every 7 days, so this plan has {{total}} total restarts.
goals.add_more_desc: Once you already have plans, this section stays collapsed until you want to add more.
goals.multi_active_hint: Plans can run at the same time. One log today advances every active plan that has not checked in yet.
goals.primary_hint: Only one primary reward plan settles plan progress points and completion rewards at a time.
goals.delete_policy_hint: Delete rule: plans without a first check-in can be deleted freely; started plans can be deleted only once per month.
goals.records_desc: Completed, paused, and interrupted plans stay here. Interrupted plans auto-restart when a matching log appears within quota.

rewards.title: Growth rewards
rewards.achievement_desc: Your points, badge wall, and latest earned records are collected here so progress feels tangible.
rewards.detail_desc: Every reward event is listed here so you can see exactly where your points came from.
rewards.level_rule: Level is based on lifetime points. Every {{count}} points raises one level.
rewards.primary_hint: Your first valid log and your primary reward plan steadily build growth points.
rewards.empty_badge: Finish a plan and your first completion badge will light up here.
rewards.badge_wall_desc: All of your earned badges are displayed here in the order you unlocked them.
rewards.recent_badges_desc: Your most recently unlocked badges stay visible here for a quick recap.
rewards.recent_activity_desc: Latest points and completion rewards appear here as they settle.
rewards.badge_detail_desc: This badge marks a completed stage and gives the achievement a clearer identity in your progress record.
rewards.empty_badge_wall: No badges to show yet. Finish a plan to light up the first one.
rewards.empty_recent: There are no newly earned badges yet.
rewards.no_ledger: No points yet. Your first valid log will start the ledger.

daily_valid_log.title: Daily valid log
daily_valid_log.desc: Your first valid log today earned base growth points.

daily_primary_goal_progress.title: Primary plan progress
daily_primary_goal_progress.desc: {{title}} moved forward today and earned primary plan points.

official_plan_completed.title: Official plan completed
official_plan_completed.desc: {{title}} finished and its official completion badge is now unlocked.

logger.plan_focus_empty_title: Let plans lead this screen first
logger.plan_focus_empty_desc: Pick a 7-day or 21-day plan first, then start logging. The push from visible plan progress is stronger than points alone.
logger.plan_focus_interrupted_title: {{count}} interrupted plans are waiting for restart
logger.plan_focus_interrupted_desc: Interrupted plans no longer occupy the home spotlight. A matching log will auto-restart them while restart quota remains.
logger.streak_dashboard_desc_active: You have kept this streak moving for {{count}} days. One log today keeps the curve alive.
logger.streak_dashboard_desc_paused: The streak is preserved at {{count}} days while paused. Resume it when you want the rhythm back.
logger.streak_dashboard_desc_completed: This run peaked at {{count}} consecutive days and finished the full plan cleanly.
logger.streak_dashboard_desc_failed: This run stopped at {{count}} consecutive days. The next round can build from here.
logger.launcher_title: Talk to it like a chat
logger.launcher_desc: Speak or type one sentence and the app will route it into finance, life logging, or planning.
logger.modal_desc: Say one sentence or type one line. The system will decide whether it is finance, a life log, or a plan.
logger.placeholder: Examples: Meeting tomorrow at 10. Lunch cost 42. Walked for 30 minutes just now.
logger.thread_status_goal_desc: You currently have {{count}} active goals. This screen now stays focused on chat-first capture.
logger.thread_status_empty_desc: This space is now centered on one-line capture. Say a plan, an expense, or something that just happened.
logger.goal_drawer_goal_hint: You currently have {{count}} active goals. Open it to manage them.
logger.goal_drawer_empty_hint: Goals now live in the left drawer instead of the chat stream.
logger.goal_drawer_focus_desc: Current primary goal: {{title}}. Manage progress, pause, resume, or create goals here.
logger.goal_drawer_manage_desc: This drawer keeps your streak goals and reward progress together, outside the chat thread.
logger.record_add_hint: Location, extra images, and full editing now live here.
logger.record_add_panel_desc: The home chat stays focused on one-sentence capture. Use this entry when you need location, richer details, or full editing.
logger.record_add_keep_tools_desc: The original modal tools for location, images, and full editing are preserved here.
logger.image_direct_hint: Without vision support, this will enter preview as an image-based record. Adding one sentence still improves accuracy.
logger.image_describe_hint: Add one short sentence before analysis for better routing into finance, logs, or plans.
logger.image_direct_prompt: I uploaded an image. Please turn it into a record first.
logger.keyboard_mode_hint: This input stays one-sentence only. Use the sidebar record-add entry for images, location, and richer editing.
logger.chat_assistant_intro: I am your life assistant. Say one sentence and I will turn it into a money record, a life log, or a plan.
logger.pull_up_for_history: Scroll up to load earlier messages
logger.chat_user_plan: Meeting tomorrow at 10, and remind me 30 minutes earlier
logger.chat_assistant_capability: Inputs like “Lunch cost 42”, “I ran for 30 minutes”, or “Remind me to pay rent on Friday” all go to the right place automatically.
logger.chat_assistant_modal_intro: Start with one sentence. I will classify it first, then save it into the right module.
logger.voice_bar: Hold to talk, or tap to start typing
logger.chat_saved_finance: Saved {{count}} finance items and linked them to "{{activity}}"

preview_kind.log: Will be saved as a life log
preview_kind.finance: Will be saved as a finance record
preview_kind.plan: Will be saved as a plan

logger.preview_expired: More than 5 minutes old and can no longer be processed
logger.undo_expired: This entry is no longer undoable
logger.undo_confirm_desc: This will delete the trigger message and the preview card. This action cannot be undone.
logger.wechat_error: WeChat recording failed. Please ensure microphone access is granted.
logger.wechat_hint: WeChat environment detected. iOS WeChat may block native voice APIs. Open in Safari or check JS-SDK config.
logger.browser_voice_hint: Please enable microphone permission in the address bar (🔒 icon) and try again.

share_meta.title: LifePulse AI - One sentence for life control
share_meta.desc: Use chat-style input for logging, finance, and planning.

share_overlay.title: Invite Friends
share_overlay.desc:
Let AI help you write daily life down with less effort.
Share with friends and start a streak together.

quick_tips.gym: Worked out at the gym for 30 mins
quick_tips.date: Had coffee with Lily, felt great

analytics.guest_hint: AI Insights are not available in Guest Mode

ai_card.guest_msg: AI insights are not available in Guest Mode. Login to unlock all-day insights, trends, and backup!
ai_card.no_data: No records in this period to analyze.
ai_card.generate_hint: Click below to generate in-depth analysis report

history.hint: Double click to view details, swipe left to delete
history.delete_content: Are you sure you want to delete "{{activity}}"? This cannot be undone.

finance.title: Finance Ledger
finance.bridge_title: New money entries should still start from chat
finance.bridge_desc: If you want to add a new expense or income, jump back to the chat home and say something like “Coffee 28 at noon”. This page stays focused on review and cleanup.
finance.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete?
